title: Notifications  - Update successful
scenario: Verify that a "Device is updated" notification appears when a firmware update completes in the background, and tapping it redirects to the Software update complete screen.
steps: 1. Ensure the Poly Lens app is installed and the device is connected.
2. Initiate a firmware update on the device.
3. While the firmware update is in progress, move the Poly Lens app to the background.
4. Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully.
5. Observe the notification area for a "Device is updated" notification.
expected: A "Device is updated" notification appears. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Software update complete screen in the Poly Lens app.
